evals.prompt: Run wtf.epic-to-features in test mode. Skip steps 0–1 (gh setup already confirmed, Epic already fetched). Use the Epic from `evals/fixtures/multi-actor-epic.json`, field `epic`. The `existing_features` array is empty — no Features have been created yet. Run step 2 only: propose the full Feature list. Output the proposed list.
evals.expected_output: A proposed Feature list covering both the Merchant and Finance Manager actors, with at least one Feature per actor, all following the [Actor] can [verb] [object] pattern and using no implementation vocabulary.
expectations: At least one proposed Feature names Merchant as the actor (e.g. 'Merchant can view settlement status')
At least one proposed Feature names Finance Manager as the actor (e.g. 'Finance Manager can export settlement report')
Every proposed Feature follows the [Actor] can [domain verb] [domain object] pattern
No proposed Feature contains implementation vocabulary such as 'API', 'database', 'endpoint', or 'table'

evals.prompt: Run wtf.epic-to-features in test mode. Skip steps 0–1 (gh setup already confirmed, Epic already fetched). Use the Epic from `evals/fixtures/existing-features-epic.json`, field `epic`. The `existing_features` field lists Features already created under this Epic — do not re-propose them. Run step 2 only: propose the remaining Features. Output the proposed list.
evals.expected_output: The output explicitly acknowledges the two Features already created (Feature #10 and Feature #11) before listing only the remaining Features. The remaining proposals cover Finance Manager capabilities and the notification capability, totalling at least 2 new Features.
expectations: The output explicitly lists or references Feature #10 ('Merchant can view settlement status') as already existing before presenting the remaining proposals
The proposed list does not include 'Merchant can view settlement status' as a new proposal
The proposed list does not include 'Merchant can filter settlements by date range' as a new proposal
The proposed list includes at least 2 new Features not yet created (covering Finance Manager or notification capabilities)

evals.prompt: Run wtf.epic-to-features in test mode. Skip steps 0–1 (gh setup already confirmed, Epic already fetched). Use the Epic from `evals/fixtures/ordered-capabilities-epic.json`, field `epic`. No existing Features. Run step 2 only: propose the full Feature list. Output the proposed list.
evals.expected_output: A proposed Feature list of 5 Features corresponding to the 5 Success Metrics, ordered so that view precedes filter and filter precedes export for the Merchant actor.
expectations: The proposed list includes exactly 5 Features, one per Success Metric
The Feature corresponding to 'Merchant can view settlement list' appears before the Feature for 'Merchant can filter settlements' in the proposed order
The Feature corresponding to 'Merchant can filter settlements' appears before the Feature for 'Merchant can export settlements' in the proposed order
All 5 proposed Features follow the [Actor] can [verb] [object] pattern
